overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a medieval RPG showing a character in a red tunic walking through rural farmland. The character traverses a hay field with wooden drying racks, passes a pond and willow tree, and continues along a dirt farm road with wooden fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: harvested hay field with wooden drying racks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cut hay field toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: small rustic wooden cabin with thatched roof in the distance
wooden tripod structure used for drying hay in the field
dense line of trees marking the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a harvested hay field with scattered wooden tripods used for drying hay. A small wooden hut is visible in the distance to the right, and a dense forest lines the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: field with wetland pond and scattered fruit trees

events.description: pond and wetland area becomes visible on the right side of the field

agents.ego_description: continuing through the field passing the pond on the right and approaching the large willow tree

entered.detail: small body of water with marshy edges surrounded by tall grass
tall willow tree with drooping branches dominating the center view
medium-sized deciduous tree with full green canopy

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as a pond appears on the right side of the field. A large willow tree dominates the center view while the wooden hut and hay racks fade from view behind. An apple tree becomes prominent on the right as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt farm road with wooden post fencing

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass field to dirt road
tree branches temporarily obscure the view from above

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt road passing briefly under overhanging tree branches

entered.detail: unpaved farm road with visible wheel ruts and scattered stones
rustic wooden post fence running alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the grassy field onto a dirt farm road. After passing briefly under overhanging tree branches that cause a momentary occlusion, the path continues along a wooden fence line with open fields on either side and distant mountains visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural farmland that transitions from a harvested hay field into an open countryside road. It begins with the character walking past wooden drying tripods and a distant hut, with a dense forest lining the horizon under a partly cloudy sky. As the character moves forward, the hay racks fade away to reveal a pond and a large, dominating willow tree, followed by the appearance of an apple tree on the right. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the grassy field and steps onto a dirt farm road, briefly passing under overhanging tree branches. Finally, the path opens up along a wooden fence line, revealing wide fields and distant mountains on the horizon.
